metadata.description: Skills do Claude Code do Furihata — pessoais e Eduzz.

plugins.name: afl
plugins.description: Use when working on an AFL (Agents for Life) Jira card — roda o /jira no contexto do AFL, mirando qualidade

plugins.name: apf
plugins.description: Use when measuring functional size in Function Points (PF/FP).

plugins.name: ask
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /ask to call the AskUserQuestion tool inline during the current task.

plugins.name: card
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /card to create a Jira card on the NIVEE board (personal project) from a short description.

plugins.name: chat
plugins.description: Use when you want deep analysis and smart answers without any file or system modifications — activates read-only guru mode

plugins.name: chat-out
plugins.description: Use when exiting /chat read-only mode to restore full read/write capabilities without losing conversation context

plugins.name: claude-modes
plugins.description: Use when setting up or replicating the user's Claude Code launch modes on a machine — terminal commands `claude` (effort max) and `claudew` (ultracode), plus IDE terminal profiles "Claude" (max) an…

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /commit in a git repo to commit current work, with optional override message in Conventional Commits format

plugins.name: eduzz-builder
plugins.description: Bundle — instala todas as skills de trabalho (Eduzz) de uma vez.

plugins.name: fast
plugins.description: Use when developing features rapidly — /fast É o /method rodando do Step 1 ao Step 8 e PARANDO no Code Review.

plugins.name: furi-builder
plugins.description: Bundle — instala todas as skills pessoais do Furihata de uma vez.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Use when working on a Jira card — Step 0 (investigação + reprodução) → /method (implementação) → human check → ship.

plugins.name: make-dev
plugins.description: Use when the user types /make-dev, runs a freshly-cloned project for the first time, hits port conflicts (EADDRINUSE / "address already in use"), needs the project's Makefile updated after gaining…

plugins.name: merge
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /merge to review open GitHub PRs targeting homolog, verify the linked NIVEE card(s) were actually resolved, and land them — or REJECT a PR (request-changes + bounce the card b…

plugins.name: method
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /method, when starting feature work, or before any code change and `docs/01-problem/` through `docs/04-spec/` lacks artifact for the feature.

plugins.name: notion-pull
plugins.description: Use when the user types `/notion-pull <slug>` to trigger a pull on the local pm-forge app (http://localhost:9432).

plugins.name: notion-push
plugins.description: Use when the user types `/notion-push <slug>` to push local MD edits back to Notion via pm-forge (http://localhost:9432).

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /pr to open a GitHub pull request for the current feature branch targeting homolog.

plugins.name: solve
plugins.description: Use when the user invokes /solve — resolve the requested task at world-class level, benchmarking against the leading big pop tech apps in the relevant domain as the quality baseline, aiming to make…

plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Use when ready to run QA on features queued in kanban/06-todo/ (cards created by /fast, pending front-validation).

plugins.name: work
plugins.description: Use when user invokes /work [NIV-X] to take a NIVEE card from todo to committed-locally — standalone, NOT the Eduzz /jira.
